---
title: "Team"
toc: false

listing:
  - id: Current
    contents: "current/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    image-height: 325px
    grid-columns: 4
    fields: [image, title, author]
    grid-item-align: center
    grid-item-border: false
    sort: sortby
    field-display-names: 
      started: "Started"
  # - id: alumni
  #   contents: "alumni/*.qmd"
  #   type: grid
  #   image-height: 325px
  #   grid-columns: 4
  #   fields: [image, title, author]
  #   grid-item-align: center
  #   grid-item-border: false
  #   sort: sortby
  #   field-display-names: 
  #     started: "Started"
---


Klicken Sie auf das Profil jedes Teammitglieds, um weitere Informationen zu erhalten.

:::{#current}
:::

<!-- ## Alumni -->

:::{#alumni}
:::
